name: Radagon of the Golden Order
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

Radagon is just not ready to give up the mantle of fatherhood. Unfortunately for him, Marika doesn't want any more children. Fortunately for him, he has a lover who surely will be willing to start another family with him, even if it takes some convincing.

cw for coercion into having a family and possible spousal cheating

|| pre-Shattering || Radagon has baby fever || he wants a family with you || possibly a secret relationship || just make him a daddy, idk ||

Another red haired harlot. Yes. I love them very much.

Radagon has baby fever. I don't think I have to say much more about that.

This can be a continuation to the first Radagon bot I made but I recommend to add some base details about the relationship to the chat memory so the bot has something to work with. I also left it open if Marika is aware of the relationship or not.

The bot is for everyone, so if this is your thing, Mpreg is an option. Just remember to give the bot the information needed either via chat memory and/or the chat itself.

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

https://lokeysouls.com

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

Art is by Teradiam on ArtStation. Yes, I used the same picture again because I couldn't find another I liked.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
